title: KNZg57a provenance trace (frontier F8, gate H)
claim_layer: L0 (documentary provenance only; no sign-value/structural/semantic claim)
verdict_qualifier: The established source is an EDITORIAL PHOTO-READING, not a scholarly edition: the lineara.xyz maintainer (Robert Hogan / mwenge) authored the 17-slot reading from the Kanta et al. 2024 photographs (credit 'Ph. Sapirstein', Fig. 7) and published it on GitHub/lineara.xyz on 2025-03-23. Epistemic confidence in the reading itself stays <= 0.5 (EPOCH-001 assumption A-3 UPDATED, not removed: source now known, reliability still unvetted).

hypothesis_outcomes.H-P1_identifiable_public_source: SUPPORTED — the source is identifiable and public (lineara.xyz GitHub commit 5facf29c, 2025-03-23T17:22:23Z), predating silver ingest; it prints all 5 silver tokens in order (5/5 >= 4/5 rule)
hypothesis_outcomes.H-P2_editorial_reconstruction: SUPPORTED as the MECHANISM — no scholarly transliteration exists (Del Freo: 'inédit'; Kanta et al. 2024 prints no sequence); the tokens are the maintainer's own photo-derived reading
hypothesis_outcomes.H-P3_fabrication: REJECTED — the reading is consistent with the editors' physical description (vessel ligatures incl. vas+RU on Face A; Fig. 7 photos are the cited basis); no contradiction found

provenance_chain.node: Kanta, Nakassis, Palaima & Perna 2024, Ariadne Suppl. 5, pp. 27-43 (DOI 10.26248/ariadne.vi.1841)
provenance_chain.content: photographs (Fig. 7, credit Ph. Sapirstein) + prose 'vas+PA, vas+RU, etc.' on Face A; prints NO transliterated sequence

KNZg57 renamed KNZg57a; 17-slot reading added: *401+RU, *652, *653, *401+RU, *418+L2, [4 lacunae], NI, [4 lacunae], VAS, [2 lacunae]; KNZg57b added (empty transliteration); cropped images KNZg57a/b-Inscription.jpg added; the local papers/KNZg57.pdf is byte-identical to the Kanta 2024 PDF
raw items_analysis/inscriptions.json carries the 7 identified tokens + 10 lacuna slots
is_sign_token requires a latin letter -> drops '*652','*653' + lacunae -> silver KNZg57a = exactly [*401+RU, *401+RU, *418+L2, NI, VAS]; KNZg57b dropped (empty transliteratedWords)
the 5-token record EPOCH-001 flagged; in the corpus since before both Anetaki seals were frozen

positive_control.result: PASS — same pipeline recovers JA-SA-JA in Younger misctexts (HM 621; CMS II 2, no. 213); method has power

negative_control.result: PASS — 0 hits across all candidate sources; the trace does not confabulate

kanta_2024_vas_RU_subquestion.statement: 'Some vases have a syllabic sign, placed above in ligature ... (vas+PA, vas+RU, etc.)' (p. 38, Face A)
kanta_2024_vas_RU_subquestion.entailment_rule_applied: (a) same sign identities (b) same count/order (c) same face
kanta_2024_vas_RU_subquestion.verdict: DOES_NOT_LICENSE — names ligature TYPES only (and includes vas+PA, absent from silver); no count, no order, no per-slot identities. The silver reading is CONSISTENT with it but not derivable from it.

seal_breach_assessment.headline: A public preliminary transliteration of KN Zg 57 EXISTS (lineara.xyz, since 2025-03-23) and is ABSENT from both seals' exposure/exclusion records -> ERRATUM_REQUIRED (Art. XVII) on the exposure documents BEFORE any scoring. The seals' scoring TARGETS are, however, not exposed by it.
seal_breach_assessment.J1_exposure_json: FACTUALLY FALSE finding ('No public source ... carries a transliterated sign-group sequence from KN Zg 57 or KN Zg 58'): false for Zg 57 since 2025-03-23; still true for Zg 58 (KNZg58 shell is empty). ERRATUM: add lineara.xyz as SRC row; correct the finding.

ANETAKI_FINAL_EDITION_DELTA_SEAL.in_current_corpus_false: MISSTATED — silver holds the 5-token fragment; needs erratum wording ('full carrier text not in corpus; a 5-token preliminary fragment is')
ANETAKI_FINAL_EDITION_DELTA_SEAL.P1_faceB_A_prefixation: NOT exposed — the 7 public tokens are vessel/commodity ligatures + NI, consistent with Face A; no Face-B sign-group revealed; scoreable
ANETAKI_FINAL_EDITION_DELTA_SEAL.P2_handle_ledger_grammar: NOT exposed — KNZg58 has no public reading; scoreable
ANETAKI_FINAL_EDITION_DELTA_SEAL.P3_ring_libation_order: NOT exposed — no libation anchor among the public tokens; scoreable

M_ANETAKI_LATTICE_DELTA_SEAL.MP1_A_only_fraction: PARTIALLY exposed denominator: 5-7 of ~119 target sign slots are publicly known; NI = syllabogram-AB, the ligatures are not A-only syllabogram types, so the A-only COUNT contamination is ~0 — but the scoring rule must EXCLUDE the publicly-known slots from prediction credit (EPOCH-001's flag, now mandatory)
M_ANETAKI_LATTICE_DELTA_SEAL.MP2_anchor_delta: NOT exposed — no value-bearing anchor derivable from the 7 tokens
M_ANETAKI_LATTICE_DELTA_SEAL.MP3_substitution_nonrescue: NOT exposed — no both-pinned variant pair derivable

seal_breach_assessment.self_inclusion_note: MP1's corpus base rate (281/5792 A-only tokens) was computed on a silver corpus that already CONTAINS KNZg57a's 5 tokens — harmless at this magnitude (<0.1% of tokens) but must be stated in the erratum.

quarantine_recommendation: Independent of the erratum: KNZg57a's reading remains an unvetted single-editor photo-reading. Keep it in silver (it is part of the frozen derivation-time state) but EXCLUDE it from (a) any future seal prediction credit and (b) any held-out scoring unit, until Anetaki II confirms or refutes it. When Anetaki II lands, grade lineara.xyz's 7 tokens as a committed external hypothesis — exactly like Rjabchikov's and Chiapello's registry objects.
information_budget_note: Art. IX: this epoch adds ZERO decipherment information (L0 metadata only); no licence state change; no new anchors.
compliance: Art. VII search receipt = source_audit (25 records); Art. XI chain explicit; Art. XII: verdict computed by the pre-frozen rule, positive control ran first; Art. XVII: erratum flagged, nothing deleted; Art. XVIII: assumption A-3 updated (source identified; reliability still <= 0.5).
